review_text:
I can't really provide feedback on the service or rooms as I only visited a friend for like 5mins.
I can give my impressions based on what I saw.
The grounds appears to be large as it has 'streets' branching off the main driveway. Each caravan site seemed to be large enough to also have 2 vehicles parked outside, still on the same caravan site.
The place was tidy and the caravans were basically the same giving a suburban housing feel.
The entry was hard to spot, I drove passed but it is right before the Burke Service Station ⛽ and I didn't see any sign.
The location is 'rural' but not far from commercial areas maybe 5mins drive.
I don't know what facilities, amenities it has but a quick call would get you the answers or look up website.

Lovely people, great location and pet friendly
Super happy we stayed here, I highly recommend it for a  caravan stay
It's an older place but very friendly and close to so many places in the Swan Valley

Monique was lovely and great. The cabin was terrible. Everything was so old and in terrible condition, bed was like sleeping on concrete. Spider webs all over the outside and the park needs some serious attention. Pool showed a cover for shade but was nothing and terribly maintained. Would not recommend especially for the price. Acclaim get your act together.
Passage avion, couloir aérien
Berry friendly help, pool was closed , showers outdaded, 2 out of 5 unusable. Park needs a big update.

Stay 7 night Caravan Park. Great location but very run down. Many taps in both toilets blocks broken. No hot water in one shower block. 36_39 degrees pool closed no shade anyway. Plenty room for van car and awning. Dump point had 4 bags of dog poo placed beside it. Lot dogs and permnants

Lisa was very kind and helped me out so much. Very accomodating. The location is convenient and despite being in the flight path its quiet otherwise. The facilities are a little tired but that didnt bother me.
Good, basic and affordable park. Friendly people and the service station on the way in is handy. Cabin was clean.

Der Standort ist das einzig gute leider, ansonsten kann ich nicht viel Gutes berichten. Das Camp ist total in die Jahre gekommen. Sowohl die Küche als auch die Bäder benötigen dringende Renovierung. Wenn man im Duschwasser der Person neben einem steht, beantwortet es alles.
Man bekommt einen Code fürs Bad, der allerdings unnötig ist, da die Türen defekt sind. Schade da die Lage wirklich toll ist.

So unorganised could not find my booking, said that someone else be my first name taken my booking, finally got my spot, showers we're old and run down no hot water taps at the sink we're not working shower and toilet doors have no locks, so organised find another caravan park in the area, stay here at your own risk.
Habe hier tolle Infos zur Umgebung bekommen. War unser letzter Tag nach 3 Wochen WA mit RV.

We booked for 8 days over the Christmas period as we were planning on visiting our 2 year old Grandson. We had to cancel 2 weeks before the booking as our little grandson died. We were charged $30 cancellation fee and lost 50% of our $225 deposit. It may well be the published policy but A bit harsh under the circumstances. We were told we were lucky that we cancelled within that time as by the next day we would have lost  the lot.

I wanted to share a review given some of the negative reviews. Yes it is an older park, but we found all amenities clean and tidy. Yes the road noise and planes can be heard, but you get that in the swan valley. We found the staff extremely friendly and helpful. The park is in a fabulous location and is a fair price for a park. Great location for concerts in the valley and we will stay again.

Süßer kleiner Campingplatz nahe Perth.
Super gelegen, Toiletten sauber und netter Pool.

Onze eerste dag met de campervan verliep niet volgens plan aangezien vrijwel alles vol was in de omgeving van Perth. Gelukkig kon de receptioniste van dit park ons helpen en mochten we na openingstijden nog inchecken. Heel fijn! Toiletgebouw is verouderd maar nog helemaal in orde en schoon. Sfeer was goed op de camping en de powered site waar we stonden was helemaal in orde. Een goed begin van onze reis!
We are staying here with our van. We love it. The owners are great, so friendly and helpful. Facilities are a little older but still fine. Also great location

Good place to stay with a caravan and dogs well priced sites a little tight to get into but can be done easily
Unfortunately there’s planes flying over all day and most of the night and into the early hours of the morning drive way into park has some massive potholes but just slow down
Otherwise in a good location amongst a wine growing area
Great park. Service above and beyond very friendly staff. The manager couldn't help me enough when I had a problem with my van. Very good service.

Many of my friends stay here and work down the road at Valley Social, it is an awesome location right in the centre of all the action that the Swan Valley offers.
Location location location.
Great people, good times friendly staff

The driveway into the park has more potholes than the Gibb river road.
Bad layout of the park as many of the roads end without room to turn around meaning a caravan going down the wrong road will have to reverse out.
Rumor has it the park is about to come under new ownership.
Hopefully the new owners will  make some changes.
Amenities block fairly dilapidated but clean. Needs renovating. Hot water is temperamental. Good location with easy access to the Swan Valley

A very old and tired park. If you have a big rig beware the sites are cramped and very hard to get into. The staff were all great and the permanent residents very friendly. The huge saving grace was the location, close to lots of Swan Valley attractions.
Really nice people here.

Disgusting Disgusting Disgusting

Will never ever be back !!!!!!!

No staff no management no maintenance no cleaning, The so called people that look after the place just yell at you when you supposedly do something  wrong but there are no signs anywhere and they don’t give any rules when you rock up so you don’t know when you will get yelled at, They are so rude and lazy they rather get drunk with the caravan club then do any work.
Pluming smells so bad the cement is all cracked the grass is to long there is no amenities at all because they are all run down way to bathrooms not clean,  There is nothing good about this place.
AVOID AVOID AVOID, We actually sold our van because the caravan parks in Perth are disgusting.

Also don’t respond with stupid excuses you guys need your license taken away.

EDIT - in response. Even as an older park, your owners need to spend money on the park to make it liveable. No amenities can be used.
You would rather have permanents in the park than good paying clients.

I never left my dog poos in your park. I picked up every day.

We paid on time every week.

We never received the map and rules as we were shown to our first site. We were then moved to a second site. Weeks later you were moving us to an 3rd site but we were sick with COVID. Shame on us for being sick.

Talk about safe. Many of the reviews of this park state, visitors felt unsafe. Your owners should invest in a drop gate. As previously stated, they only give you a budget of $300 to spend at a time. You need to get approval for about $3m.

The council should revoke your operating licence. It’s a health hazard. Your cleaner only has 20mins to clean the toilet. She has even stated this. She has also stated that she cannot clean above her shoulders.

You need staff to assist you in managing this park. Your owners need to be less greedy before increasing the nightly fee.

Have people to work. I have never seen a caravan park so under staffed. Hence why it is so unclean.

Very old caravan Park that is not looked after. The amenities is old and falling apart the sites are not kept up to standard. The dryers are faulty and need maintence. The only saving grace is it sort of central. Stayed there for 4 days and the smoke from local burn offs was bloody terrible. I know it was not their fault but still the same.

Definitely not one of the nicer caravan parks not somewhere you'd want to bring your family. constantly hearing noises all times of the night. Definitely lock your stuff up as they say it is not long term but everyone there has been there for ages .
As well as our hose had been cut somehow and no lawn mowing had been done office said they were sending someone to have a look and no one came so now replacing hose ourselves thank you acclaim

We were staying 4 nights and 3 days so wanted an economical stay , it's affordable,but just that the bathroom could be more hygienic cleaned and too narrow, the unit we took for 4 , 2 adults and 2 kids was ok but it was quiet cramped if it was a bit spacious would have been great , the laundry service available was great for our long stay and we were on a road trip, the check in and check out was cool and the parking was good. For the cost it was fine but there are other spacious units too for families but on different rates in the park. Thank you.

Unfortunately we booked a powered site without doing alot of research.

We paid $85 for 1 night.

When we arrived we walked around the park to find it not clean, unsafe and in disrepair.
Over priced.
Bathroom facilities disgusting.
Kitchen facilities terrible.
Did not feel safe.
Left within 10 minutes of being in the park.
Management would not refund our money.
We organised alternative accommodation paying $60 for a powered site.

The park is in a perfect spot for all the great things the Valley has to offer but sadly it’s also very run down , the showers are hit and miss , broken tiles , door locks not working , hot water taking an age to come through , the laundry needs demolishing , the big old rusty filthy boiler covered in cobwebs etc is a health hazard , the mangers are accommodating and pleasant , was not aware there were permanent residents , and DV and the police coming out one night not good !!!

Front service staff was very helpful and friendly
Very small turning area for caravans
Facilities altogether clean are very dated
Grounds need someone who wants to cut the grass more often.

Great camping where you can stay for a while and enjoy the nature around. Swan valley area is a good spot because all the vineyard, honey fabrics, fruit & veg local markets are close to this camping. The pool is really nice when you get hot. 35$ unpowered and 45$ powered one of the cheapest around Perth.
Thank you to lisa and Glenn.
Stayed at the place with my caravan, great location,  facilities quite old but were clean, staff was very friendly and helpful

Motel getting  a bit tired, does need renovation on older area used for visitors in van type accommodation, as the other half is residential life style type park. Pool was closed when we wanted to swim and the laundry area is so so.
OK for a night or two. Only thing going for it,  is it is closer to things to visit in the Swan Valley area.

Rapporto qualità prezzo eccezionale in confronto agli altri.
Pulitissimo per lo più.
Siamo rimasti molto soddisfatti
Really good experience. Abilities are clean. Managers are really nice and helpful. Good spots. Swimingpool, pool and darts.

Really good caravan park. Lisa & Glenn the managers are great peoples, really friendly and helpful!
Amenities are clean, swimming pool refreshing and the pool table has helped me to improve my playing skills!
The caravan park is in the heart of the Swan valley, close to activities and kangaroos come to say hello at dusk.

Hi Glenn and Lisa ! Thank you very much for our stay. We had a really good time in your caravan park. Great swimming pool, clean amenities, great nature around, a refreshing climatized room to read or play billard. You were very nice to us.
Thank you !
We recommend this place !
Great value & great location

-I do not recommend any Acclaim Holiday Parks. The owners J & S Chacko are before a matter with the State Administrative Tribunal. The owners evicted near 100 mainly pensioners from Kingsway Caravan Park in 2009. Reference - Internet -|a)under - Kingsway Caravan Park 2009, headings - RECEIVED (cci sub 1) and WHEN A HOME IS A CASTLE ON SHAKY GROUND (ABC).|b)under - Kingsway Caravan Park Submission George & Shirley Jackson 2009, heading - CCI SUB 6.|c)under -  CCI submissions 2009, heading - CCI SUB 94.|d)under -Standing Committee Kingsway Caravan Park 2009, heading - SHIRE OF MOORA MINUTES.|Question; did the owners J&S Chacko pay compensation to near 100 mainly pensioners from Kingsway caravan park when they evicted them in 2009??? NO!

Great little Caravan park tucked away in the Swan Valley. Nice and quiet , management great to deal with, nothing was to much trouble. Will be coming back soon and will be my only destination when in Perth from now on. Wineries and Cafes all around it.

Camping located in the beautiful Swan Valley area, where you will hear the sweet song of the Kookaburra at the sunrise. The unpowered sites got lots of shade during the day.
The team is doing their best to keep clean all the places : amenities and swimming pool
And of course, Lisa and Glen (the managers) will try to respond favourably to all your requests.
Old place, not everything is perfect but price is good and managers very friendly and helpful!

Stayed for almost 6 months when we finally found an apartment we still had a week owing when we got kicked off our sites to put someone else on
Still owed a week have called and message multiple time and they refused to give a refund 😡😡😡
DON’T RECOMMEND plus always had dog Poo on the big field

Great staff. They were very accommodating in meeting our needs.
Lovely pool.
Good location for our needs.

We love this park its leafy, quiet and convenient. Lisa and the staff have been so kind towards us. We have been here for a month tomorrow and its feeling like home for us.  We will be here for ages. We love it.

Do not stay here!
Heaps of permanent people, undesirable people - did not feel safe at all and were constantly worried about our belongings.
The toilets are old and filthy - missing amd cracked tiles, holes in the walls, smell of fish/blocked drains.
So disappointing as its still $45/n for a powered site and in a beautiful area.

Nice little park.  Concrete & grass sites.  Very kind Manager let me have a late checkout to have some scans before I left.
Great location for the wine region.
Absolute dump  out dated, sites filthy, long grass, amenities poor condition , taps leak, toilet doors don't close,  would never go there again!!
This place it’s horrible, everything dirty/broken, toilets disgusting, kids park flooded and not functioning, pool also not working and dirty. Full of junkies around not safety environment.
Lisa and her husband are great they do their best to help and accommodate all there customers. We had a lovely stay

We have travelled all around AustrLia in our caravan,although we extended our stay because we could not get anywhere else and were waiting on some work to our car,the facilities,amenities block are one of the worst we have seen,toilets did not flush well enough to flush properly,tap handles had no tap nuts holding them on and were falling off in shower,sinks rusty,amenities ceiling dirty in need of paint,floors dirty no hot water for a day because gas ran out,clothes dryers do not work and basically take the money,no presence of park management,slab for caravan site uneven and cracked,our site was near the sewerage tank and public clothesline which had no separation from caravan site,put mildly it is a disgrace and charges top dollar

The worst place I have ever seen, the room was dirty and old, smelt like musty old smoke. I refused to stay, didn’t feel safe and didn’t want to touch ANYTHING, the bedding is so old and unhygienic! The park was filthy, no maintenance done to the park, and the residents didn’t look nice to put it nicely.
I booked for two night but refused to stay, they wouldn’t refund my second night stay. Definitely WOULDN'T recommend!!!!
Great campground! Has everything you need and the most friendly staff! Perfect for a stay around Perth!
Bring a hazmat suit for the bathrooms & laundry, and some earplugs for the planes and you'll be fine!

Terrible management,
Park Gestapo namely Glen has become quite unbeatable with his style of management.
Steer clear of here

stayed in one of their chalets. a bit run down but good enough if you don't mind something a bit older. staff were friendly and welcoming. 90s style accommodation.  Reno's needed but okay for what you pay. shower works well. toilet was new.
I spent 2 years living there in my caravan. The staff were always friendly and helpful.

Don’t Bother!!!
Deplorable sites long grass cracked slabs
Didn’t even dare to use amenities
$45 a night. Rip off!

This place is like a huge toilet, it comes badly small from the toilets and also from the caravan which is cleaning their chemical toilet on the campground on the grass!
The facilities are very very old and poorly fixed, but usable if you can access it, because the door from the kitchen and the male toilet was broken.
We got a powered site next to huge caravans and at the same time, 3 much nicer sites stayed empty...
Nice small caravan park with a swimming pool and a kids play ground . Amenities are very clean. Nearby Perth and Perth airport (15mn drive to both)

Had an amazing stay here, the staff are extremely helpful and friendly. They were very accommodating as we were a large group wanting to camp together, it made our arrival in Perth very comfortable after a long road trip.
They are old and pretty grotty.  Still, we needed accommodation after a wedding so they did the trick.  The pool was nice and clean.

Great value and location near lots of vineyards to do wine tasting! Excellent games room with lots of entertainment, puzzles, movies and pool table.
Glen & Sarah were very nice and helpful 😊

I booked this accommodation for 4 nights. Had to leave after our first. When me and my son checked in, Apartment 5 appeared clean but as we looked inside the bathroom, the ceiling was full of mould. The bed sheets were dirty with stains and hair all over. The pillows were smelly. The lady in apartment 2 was using abusing language, Apartment 4 couple were having domestic issues. We went to kmart to buy extra bedding's so we can have clean bedding to sleep on.When I raised the issue with the manager, she basically told me that apartment (5), should not have  been booked at all because it's under maintenance. I asked for refund and she blamed webjet for booking it. I called webjet and they said the manager needs to authorise the refund. They manager offered me another room but after what I experienced on first night, I would not spend another minute at that site. Who ever's fault, I am raising this issue with authorities.

Xlnt location, offset by the poor (non existent) evidence of maintenance. Bathrooms badly run down, hand basins rusted, taps old & leaky, several styles of tiles on floor and shower alcoves, paint peeling from buildings. Can be quite difficult to access caravan sites. Apparently high turnover of Management, current duo trying hard and are ok and helpful. Park located on, flight path to/ from Perth airport resulting in periods of almost continual air traffic. I
A bit old and issues with power and toilets not bad for a emergency overnighter but wouldn’t stay there for a extended stay

Recently booked for 3 nights in a self contained cabin , it was perfect for our requirements and value for money ,clean and comfortable.
I cannot recommend the park manager enough and his staff , very friendly and efficient in every aspect of the park .
Our only complaint was because of a ignorant group of people repeatedly trying to use an large  style air conditioning unit for their TENT !!
Which would then trip out all the sites power supply
The manager dealt with this matter multiple times during our stay and was abused by the group who clearly didn’t want to pay for a chalet but expected the same in comfort for a tent site fee!
It’s a shame that these types have to ruin everyone’s enjoyment.
But that being said I would definitely return to the park regardless and recommend it to travelers as it’s in the perfect location  in the swan valley to visit surrounding areas.
It was lovely to meet the manager and have many chats and laughs ,well done to all .
Keep up the great work and ongoing effort to make peoples stay as enjoyable and hassle free as possible .
Kind regards Helen

Just emptied by chemical toilet.
$5

Sarah is a delightful lady. A definite asset to Acclaim Swan Valley Tourist Park.

I would love if people could learn from my absolutely horrible experience that only lasted  1hr45ish minutes at this absolute dive.
This is my first ever review but I’m disgusted as a new father and as my first time in Perth the way it went. It’s long but worth the read.

Arrived there and met Glen at the office, seemed nice at the time. Got to my patch was no 113 on the site. This is down at the very back in the full timers area. ( which is 70% of this place they call a caravan park) .  However to discover the next door people were blaring music and smoking illegal drugs at 4:30 pm on a Saturday, smashing glass and hitting golf balls against their caravan annex. I reached out to glen and asked him would it be possible to move but there was no space available and didn’t seem too concerned for me and my family (13 week old baby). He then went on to make a very inappropriate comment about young lady’s (young) skinny dipping in the mornings. I did not find this one bit funny or professional.

The cabin across from me there was a mentally ill man who went off, shouting and banging in his cabin so we felt very unsafe. His full time neighbour came and apologised and said he does this one or twice a week and this is normal(absolutely not normal) safe to say we packed up within 15 minutes and fled. Rang the next morning and got no where with a refund. I would highly advise to stay as far away as possible and especially with a family.

Kip

‘The best campsite I’ve ever been to’ as voted by our 6yr old. He loved watching all the planes coming overhead.

The pool is amazing too, this campsite is in a great little spot. Very quiet campsite other than the planes coming over head (as you would expect being so close to the airport) we would definitely come again!
Pool was nice and cold

Very friendly staff
Good hot showers
I stayed in the camp site.
Petrol station out the front..
Exiting the park takes a bit of time. As west swan rd can be very busy at times.
All in all great park to stay.
Will be back.

Caravan park in ideal situation for visiting Swan Valley. Powered sites tight for longer vans. Laundry needs more than 2 washing machines, particularly if one person uses the 2 machines. Service Station at front of the park has reduced hot food available from when we were here last. Fuel.price very competitive.

Manager very friendly.  So close to all the great vineyards so much to see and do. Clean older facilities.  Big old boiler which takes time to heat up but well worth the wait for a lovely hot shower. Washing machines and dryer. Close to Mildlands and Guilford for shopping. Pet friendly.  We will be back
Thank you to Glen and Sarah for a very lovely stay. Very nice park and friendly people. Glen and Sarah are very nice and easy to get along with. Will definitely be staying again.

It pretty poor when there is no hot water and you can't even have a shower.  There a few things that may be forgiveable but charging for basic facilities you can't use is not one of them.
I was appalled to find out there was no hot water for a shower. One thing most go to a caravan park sites for is a shower and to be connected to electricity and gas. 🙄

Perfect stop over after a delayed flight into Perth, the manager was great and welcoming, and he did a fantastic job at making us feel at ease after naively thinking we’d be able to find some where to stay late on a Saturday evening

Rude staff. After complaining and trying to talk to them my mate was threatened with being banned from all tourist parks in WA. ||Kicked out even though a few units down there was a very bad domestic violence dispute...they get to stay.
After seeing how other people are treated by the park manager I would never recommend this place to anyone who doesn't wish to be belitted and treated poorly.
